identity.content:
# Identity

## Expertise
[Your areas of specialization and methodology/approach]

## Positioning
[What makes you unique? How do you differentiate in the market?]

## Client Types
[Types of clients you work with — industry, size, typical challenges]

## Communication Style
[How you communicate — with clients, in deliverables, preferred formats]

instructions.content:
# Instructions

## Language
[Preferred language for deliverables and client work]

## Deliverable Format
[How to structure reports, proposals, and other deliverables]

## Client Communication Rules
[Guidelines for tone, approach, and professionalism in client-facing work]

context.content:
# Context

## Active Engagements
[Current client projects with scope, timeline, and phase]

## Pipeline
[Upcoming opportunities or proposals in progress]

## Priorities
[What needs attention right now?]

## Key Deadlines
[Upcoming deliverables with dates]
